blockingIssues.description: Folder verification ignores unexpected secondary diagnostics whose (ruleId, severity) pair is absent from the contract, so new unapproved secondary diagnostics can pass sample verification silently instead of failing as non-allowlisted behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure reporting or review guidance so handoffs do not mark followedProcedure=true when transcript order shows failing verification was added only after implementation edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for sample-diagnostics-claim-contract-hardening found transcript edits to verifier/contract files before the later regression-test addition, even though the skill requires writing failing verification first and the handoff reported followedProcedure=true.
